title: Orchestration Receipt
description: An immutable record of a discrete event or decision within the NemoClaw substrate.

type.description: The category of the event recorded in this receipt.

runId.description: Identifier of the orchestration run this receipt belongs to.

planId.description: Identifier of the plan this receipt belongs to.

stepId.description: Identifier of the step this receipt belongs to, if applicable.

timestamp.description: The precise time the event occurred.

reasonCode.description: Machine-readable code explaining the reason for this receipt.

correlationId.description: Identifier used to link this receipt to external events or parent processes.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature ensuring the integrity and authenticity of the receipt.
